                                                                                  inductive Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr :
                                                                                  Type

                                                                                  A pointer to an operation operand pointer. This is used for the encoding of the use-def chain. It is either pointing to the next use field of the previous operand, or to the first use field of a value definition.

                                                                                  • valueFirstUse (ptr : ValuePtr) : OpOperandPtrPtr

                                                                                          An operand definition. It contains a pointer to the SSA value it uses, and links to the previous and next use of that value.

                                                                                          • nextUse : Option OpOperandPtr
                                                                                          • back : OpOperandPtrPtr
                                                                                          • owner : OperationPtr
                                                                                          • value : ValuePtr

                                                                                              Instances For
                                                                                                source
                                                                                                inductive Veir.BlockOperandPtrPtr :
                                                                                                Type

                                                                                                A pointer to an operation block operand pointer. This is used for the encoding of the use-def chain for block operands. It is either pointing to the next use field of the previous block operand, or to the first use field of a block.

                                                                                                • blockOperandNextUse (ptr : BlockOperandPtr) : BlockOperandPtrPtr
                                                                                                • blockFirstUse (ptr : BlockPtr) : BlockOperandPtrPtr
                                                                                                Instances For

                                                                                                                    op1 = op2
                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                    theorem Veir.OpOperand.ext_iff {op1 op2 : OpOperand} :
                                                                                                                    op1 = op2 ↔ op1.nextUse = op2.nextUse ∧ op1.back = op2.back ∧ op1.owner = op2.owner ∧ op1.value = op2.value

                                                                                                                                structure Veir.IRContext (OpInfo : Type) [HasOpInfo OpInfo] :
                                                                                                                                Type

                                                                                                                                The owning context of an MLIR module. It contains a top-level Module operation, and a maps from pointers to operations, blocks, and regions.

                                                                                                                                • operations : Std.HashMap OperationPtr (Operation OpInfo)
                                                                                                                                • blocks : Std.HashMap BlockPtr Block
                                                                                                                                • regions : Std.HashMap RegionPtr Region

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          operand.setValue! ctx newValue = operand.setValue ctx newValue inBounds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          op.getSuccessor! ctx index = ({ op := op, index := index }.get! ctx).value

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          def Veir.OpResultPtr.InBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (result : OpResultPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Prop
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • result.InBounds ctx = ∃ (h : result.op.InBounds ctx), result.index < (result.op.get ctx h).results.size
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.inBounds_def {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {res : OpResultPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            res.InBounds ctx ↔ ∃ (h : res.op.InBounds ctx), res.index < res.op.getNumResults ctx h
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • Veir.OpResultPtr.instDecidableInBounds = id inferInstance

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.inBounds_OperationPtr_getNumResults! {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (result : OpResultPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (h : result.InBounds ctx) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            result.index < result.op.getNumResults! ctx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.inBounds_of {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {result : OpResultPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            result.op.InBounds ctx → result.index < result.op.getNumResults! ctx → result.InBounds ctx

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.allocEmpty_def {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {ptr' : BlockPtr} (heq : allocEmpty ctx = some (ctx', ptr')) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ctx' = { id := ctx.nextID }.set { operations := ctx.operations, blocks := ctx.blocks, regions := ctx.regions, nextID := ctx.nextID + 1 } Block.empty
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        block.getNumArguments! ctx = block.getNumArguments ctx ⋯

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem Veir.BlockPtr.getNumArguments!_eq_of_BlockPtr_get!_eq {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        block.get! ctx = block.get! ctx' → block.getNumArguments! ctx = block.getNumArguments! ctx'

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          block.getArgument index = { block := block, index := index }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          (block.getArgument index).index = index

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          (block.getArgument index).block = block

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      BlockArgumentPtr accessors

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      def Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.InBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (arg : BlockArgumentPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Prop
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • arg.InBounds ctx = ∃ (h : arg.block.InBounds ctx), arg.index < (arg.block.get ctx h).arguments.size
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.inBounds_def {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {arg : BlockArgumentPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        arg.InBounds ctx ↔ ∃ (h : arg.block.InBounds ctx), arg.index < arg.block.getNumArguments ctx h
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        @[implicit_reducible]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        instance Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.instDecidableInBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {arg : BlockArgumentPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Decidable (arg.InBounds ctx)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.instDecidableInBounds = id inferInstance
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.InBounds_iff {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (arg : BlockArgumentPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        arg.block.InBounds ctx → arg.index < arg.block.getNumArguments! ctx → arg.InBounds ctx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ValuePtr → IRContext OpInfo → Prop
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • op_result {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptr : OpResultPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) : ptr.InBounds ctx → (opResult ptr).InBounds ctx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • block_argument {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptr : BlockArgumentPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) : ptr.InBounds ctx → (blockArgument ptr).InBounds ctx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem Veir.ValuePtr.inBounds_opResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptr : OpResultPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      (opResult ptr).InBounds ctx ↔ ptr.InBounds ctx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem Veir.ValuePtr.inBounds_blockArg {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptr : BlockArgumentPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      (blockArgument ptr).InBounds ctx ↔ ptr.InBounds ctx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      @[implicit_reducible]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      instance Veir.ValuePtr.instDecidableInBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {value : ValuePtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Decidable (value.InBounds ctx)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              def Veir.ValuePtr.getDefiningOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (value : ValuePtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (valueIn : value.InBounds ctx := by grind) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Option OperationPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • (Veir.ValuePtr.opResult ptr).getDefiningOp ctx argIn_1 = some (ptr.get ctx ⋯).owner
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • (Veir.ValuePtr.blockArgument ptr).getDefiningOp ctx argIn_1 = none
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                def Veir.ValuePtr.getDefiningOp! {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (value : ValuePtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Option OperationPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • (Veir.ValuePtr.opResult a).getDefiningOp! ctx = some (a.get! ctx).owner
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • (Veir.ValuePtr.blockArgument a).getDefiningOp! ctx = none
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getDefiningOp!_def {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {value : ValuePtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  value.getDefiningOp! ctx = match value with | opResult ptr => some (ptr.get! ctx).owner | blockArgument ptr => none
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getDefiningOp!_eq_getDefiningOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {ptr : ValuePtr} (hin : ptr.InBounds ctx) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ptr.getDefiningOp! ctx = ptr.getDefiningOp ctx hin
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getDefiningOp!_opResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {res : OpResultPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  (opResult res).getDefiningOp! ctx = some (res.get! ctx).owner
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getDefiningOp!_blockArgument {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {ba : BlockArgumentPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  (blockArgument ba).getDefiningOp! ctx = none
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getDefiningOp!_eq_some_iff {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {value : ValuePtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  value.getDefiningOp! ctx = some op ↔ ∃ (opRes : OpResultPtr), value = opResult opRes ∧ (opRes.get! ctx).owner = op
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getDefiningOp!_eq_none_iff {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {value : ValuePtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  value.getDefiningOp! ctx = none ↔ ∃ (blockArg : BlockArgumentPtr), value = blockArgument blockArg
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  def Veir.ValuePtr.hasUses {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (value : ValuePtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (valueIn : value.InBounds ctx := by grind) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Bool

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Returns true if the value has any uses.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • value.hasUses ctx valueIn = (value.getFirstUse ctx ⋯).isSome
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.hasUses_def {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {value : ValuePtr} (valueIn : value.InBounds ctx) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    value.hasUses ctx ⋯ = (value.getFirstUse ctx ⋯).isSome
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    def Veir.ValuePtr.hasUses! {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (value : ValuePtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Bool

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Returns true if the value has any uses.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • value.hasUses! ctx = (value.getFirstUse! ctx).isSome
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem Veir.ValuePtr.hasUses!_eq_hasUses {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {ptr : ValuePtr} (hin : ptr.InBounds ctx) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ptr.hasUses! ctx = ptr.hasUses ctx hin
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      theorem Veir.ValuePtr.hasUses!_def {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {value : ValuePtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      value.hasUses! ctx = (value.getFirstUse! ctx).isSome
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      def Veir.ValuePtr.setType {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (arg : ValuePtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (newType : TypeAttr) (argIn : arg.InBounds ctx := by grind) :

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • (Veir.ValuePtr.blockArgument a).setType! ctx newType = a.setType! ctx newType

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          arg.setType! ctx newType = arg.setType ctx newType inBounds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            IRContext OpInfo

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • (Veir.ValuePtr.blockArgument a).setFirstUse! ctx newFirstUse = a.setFirstUse! ctx newFirstUse

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem Veir.ValuePtr.setFirstUse!_eq_setFirstUse {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newFirstUse : Option OpOperandPtr} {arg : ValuePtr} (inBounds : arg.InBounds ctx) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              arg.setFirstUse! ctx newFirstUse = arg.setFirstUse ctx newFirstUse inBounds
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (opResult ptr).setFirstUse ctx newFirstUse ptrIn = ptr.setFirstUse ctx newFirstUse ⋯
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (opResult ptr).setType ctx newType ptrIn = ptr.setType ctx newType ⋯
