                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (blockArgument ptr).setType ctx newType ptrIn = ptr.setType ctx newType ⋯
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getResultTypes!_def {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              op.getResultTypes! ctx = Array.map (fun (v : ValuePtr) => v.getType! ctx) (op.getResults! ctx)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getResultTypes!.getElem!_eq {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {index : Nat} {op : OperationPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              index < op.getNumResults! ctx → (op.getResultTypes! ctx)[index]! = ((op.getResult index).get! ctx).type
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getResultTypes!.getElem_eq {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {index : Nat} {op : OperationPtr} {h : index < (op.getResultTypes! ctx).size} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              (op.getResultTypes! ctx)[index] = ((op.getResult index).get! ctx).type

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              OpOperandPtrPtr accessors

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              inductive Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.InBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              OpOperandPtrPtr → Prop
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • operandNextUseInBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} (ptr : OpOperandPtr) : ptr.InBounds ctx → InBounds ctx (operandNextUse ptr)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • valueFirstUseInBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} (ptr : ValuePtr) : ptr.InBounds ctx → InBounds ctx (valueFirstUse ptr)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.inBounds_operandNextUse {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptr : OpOperandPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InBounds ctx (operandNextUse ptr) ↔ ptr.InBounds ctx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[simp]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.inBounds_valueFirstUse {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptr : ValuePtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                InBounds ctx (valueFirstUse ptr) ↔ ptr.InBounds ctx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                @[implicit_reducible]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                instance Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.instDecidableInBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {value : OpOperandPtrPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Decidable (InBounds ctx value)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                def Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.get {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptrPtr : OpOperandPtrPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (ptrPtrIn : InBounds ctx ptrPtr := by grind) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Option OpOperandPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • (Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.operandNextUse ptr).get ctx ptrPtrIn_2 = (ptr.get ctx ⋯).nextUse
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • (Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse val).get ctx ptrPtrIn_2 = val.getFirstUse ctx ⋯
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  def Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.get! {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptrPtr : OpOperandPtrPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • (Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.operandNextUse a).get! ctx = (a.get! ctx).nextUse
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • (Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse a).get! ctx = a.getFirstUse! ctx

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    ptrPtr.get! ctx = ptrPtr.get ctx hin

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    (operandNextUse ptr).get ctx ⋯ = (ptr.get ctx ⋯).nextUse

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    (valueFirstUse ptr).get! ctx = ptr.getFirstUse! ctx

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        RegionPtr accessors

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        def Veir.RegionPtr.InBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (region : RegionPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Prop
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • region.InBounds ctx = (region ∈ ctx.regions)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          def Veir.RegionPtr.inBounds_def {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          region.InBounds ctx ↔ region ∈ ctx.regions
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • ⋯ = ⋯
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            @[implicit_reducible]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            instance Veir.RegionPtr.instDecidableInBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Decidable (region.InBounds ctx)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • Veir.RegionPtr.instDecidableInBounds = id inferInstance
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            def Veir.RegionPtr.get {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptr : RegionPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (inBounds : ptr.InBounds ctx := by grind) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Region
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • ptr.get ctx inBounds = ctx.regions[ptr]
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • ptr.get! ctx = ctx.regions[ptr]!
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem Veir.RegionPtr.get!_eq_get {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {ptr : RegionPtr} (hin : ptr.InBounds ctx) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ptr.get! ctx = ptr.get ctx hin
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                def Veir.RegionPtr.set {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ptr : RegionPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (newRegion : Region) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                IRContext OpInfo
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • ptr.set ctx newRegion = { operations := ctx.operations, blocks := ctx.blocks, regions := ctx.regions.insert ptr newRegion, nextID := ctx.nextID }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  def Veir.RegionPtr.setParent {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (region : RegionPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (newParent : OperationPtr) (inBounds : region.InBounds ctx := by grind) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  IRContext OpInfo
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • region.setParent ctx newParent inBounds = region.set ctx { firstBlock := (region.get ctx ⋯).firstBlock, lastBlock := (region.get ctx ⋯).lastBlock, parent := some newParent }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • region.setParent! ctx newParent = region.set ctx { firstBlock := (region.get! ctx).firstBlock, lastBlock := (region.get! ctx).lastBlock, parent := some newParent }

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      region.setParent! ctx newParent = region.setParent ctx newParent inBounds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  InBounds ctx (blockOperandNextUse ptr) ↔ ptr.InBounds ctx

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • (Veir.BlockOperandPtrPtr.blockFirstUse a).get! ctx = (a.get! ctx).firstUse

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      ptrPtr.get! ctx = ptrPtr.get ctx hin

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      (blockOperandNextUse bo).get! ctx = (bo.get! ctx).nextUse

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      (blockFirstUse bl).get! ctx = (bl.get! ctx).firstUse
