                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          def Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses.loop {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (op : OperationPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (index : Nat) (opIn : op.InBounds ctx := by grind) (hresult : index < op.getNumResults ctx ⋯ := by grind) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Bool
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses.loop op ctx 0 opIn hresult_2 = if ((op.getResult 0).get ctx ⋯).firstUse.isSome = true then true else false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses.loop op ctx index'.succ opIn hresult_2 = if ((op.getResult index'.succ).get ctx ⋯).firstUse.isSome = true then true else Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses.loop op ctx index' ⋯ ⋯
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            def Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (op : OperationPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (opIn : op.InBounds ctx := by grind) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Bool
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • op.hasUses ctx opIn = if h : op.getNumResults ctx ⋯ = 0 then false else Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses.loop op ctx (op.getNumResults ctx ⋯ - 1) ⋯ ⋯
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              def Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!.loop {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (op : OperationPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (index : Nat) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Bool
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!.loop op ctx 0 = if ((op.getResult 0).get! ctx).firstUse.isSome = true then true else false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!.loop op ctx index'.succ = if ((op.getResult index'.succ).get! ctx).firstUse.isSome = true then true else Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!.loop op ctx index'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                def Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses! {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (op : OperationPtr) (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Bool
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • op.hasUses! ctx = if op.getNumResults! ctx = 0 then false else Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!.loop op ctx (op.getNumResults! ctx - 1)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!.loop_eq_hasUses_loop {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {op : OperationPtr} (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) (index : Nat) (opIn : op.InBounds ctx) (hresult : index < op.getNumResults ctx ⋯ := by grind) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  loop op ctx index = hasUses.loop op ctx index opIn hresult
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!_eq_hasUses {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} (hin : op.InBounds ctx) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  op.hasUses! ctx = op.hasUses ctx hin
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!.loop_eq_true_iff {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {index : Nat} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  loop op ctx index = true ↔ ∃ (index' : Nat), index' ≤ index ∧ (ValuePtr.opResult (op.getResult index')).hasUses! ctx = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!_eq_true_iff_hasUses!_getResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  op.hasUses! ctx = true ↔ ∃ (index : Nat), index < op.getNumResults! ctx ∧ (ValuePtr.opResult (op.getResult index)).hasUses! ctx = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!_eq_false_iff_hasUses!_getResult_eq_false {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  op.hasUses! ctx = false ↔ ∀ (index : Nat), index < op.getNumResults! ctx → (ValuePtr.opResult (op.getResult index)).hasUses! ctx = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Veir.OperationPtr.hasUses!_eq_false_iff_hasUses!_opResult_eq_false {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} (inBounds : op.InBounds ctx) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  op.hasUses! ctx = false ↔ ∀ (opResult : OpResultPtr), opResult.InBounds ctx → opResult.op = op → (ValuePtr.opResult opResult).hasUses! ctx = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  def Veir.IRContext.empty (OpInfo : Type) [HasOpInfo OpInfo] :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  IRContext OpInfo
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • Veir.IRContext.empty OpInfo = { operations := Std.HashMap.emptyWithCapacity, blocks := Std.HashMap.emptyWithCapacity, regions := Std.HashMap.emptyWithCapacity, nextID := 0 }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    def Veir.IRContext.forOpsDepM {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] (ctx : IRContext OpInfo) {m : Type w → Type w'} [Monad m] (p : (op : OperationPtr) → op.InBounds ctx → m PUnit) :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    m PUnit

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Run a function on all operations in the context. In particular, the function provides a proof that the operation pointer is in bounds.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • ctx.forOpsDepM p = ctx.operations.forKeysDepM fun (opPtr : Veir.OperationPtr) (h : opPtr ∈ ctx.operations) => p opPtr ⋯
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Instances For

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Generic pointers

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      inductive Veir.GenericPtr :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Type
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • block (ptr : BlockPtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • operation (ptr : OperationPtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • opResult (ptr : OpResultPtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • opOperand (ptr : OpOperandPtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • blockOperand (ptr : BlockOperandPtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • blockOperandPtr (ptr : BlockOperandPtrPtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • blockArgument (ptr : BlockArgumentPtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • region (ptr : RegionPtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • value (ptr : ValuePtr) : GenericPtr
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • opOperandPtr (ptr : OpOperandPtrPtr) : GenericPtr

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          instance Veir.GenericPtr.instDecidableInBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {ptr : GenericPtr} :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Decidable (ptr.InBounds ctx)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          def Veir.commandSetup_grind_with_get_set_definitions :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Lean.ParserDescr

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Macro to mark all get/set defitinions as local grind lemmas This should only be used inside Core/, as the other files in this folder should define all the necessary lemmas without having to unfold these definitions.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • Veir.commandSetup_grind_with_get_set_definitions = Lean.ParserDescr.node `Veir.commandSetup_grind_with_get_set_definitions 1024 (Lean.ParserDescr.symbol "setup_grind_with_get_set_definitions")
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Instances For
